text:
a related post from the forums:

https://forums.freebsd.org/threads/new-formatting-sequences-for-the-ps1-special-variable-in-freebsd-14-0-release.91834/#post-685983

Update:

- the visual glitches cause other issues such as strange backspace behavior, like the line being edited is out of sync. 

- confirmed issue on 15-CURRENT

- occurs over SSH with $TERM being xterm-256color or tmux-256color

- occurs on fresh VM
